title: Flat Weapons
description: Changes the look of the Axe and Sword so it looks way cleaner an cooler
body:
It changes the look of the Axe and Sword so it looks more cleaner and cooler 

And so I can try Modrinth for the first time

I don't think I would make more thing like this beacause I'm not that talentad I just more simple Resource Packs for fun
